All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
Game
Represents the core game logic and state for the Fast Typing Game.
GameController
Controller for the Fast Typing Game user interface.
MainApp
Main entry point for the Fast Typing Game application.
Validator
Utility class that provides validation methods for the Fast Typing Game.
WordRepository
Repository that provides words and phrases used in the Fast Typing Game.
